    midi2Model(int) - Methode in Klasse de.btu.kt.syx.midi.SyxParamInfo
    Converts a MIDI value to its model value.

    Converts a MIDI value to a string representation of its model value.

    Called on MIDI input.
    MidiInterface - Klasse in de.btu.kt.syx.util
    A physical or virtual MIDI interface with a MIDI in and a MIDI out device.

    Creates a new MIDI interface.

    Creates a new MIDI interface.

    Creates a new MIDI interface.

    Called on MIDI output.

    Converts a model value to its MIDI value.
